prompt: Here's my 4-day pairing file. Don't create events — output the full event details for each day as they would appear in the calendar.

assertions.text: Each title uses the format 'E3405 · HHMM ORG → HHMM DEST' with → arrow
Day 1 notes: 'Day 1 of 4', report 1215, release 2142, RON Fairfield Inn Aberdeen
Day 4 notes: 'Day 4 of 4', no RON line (last day of trip)
All flight numbers prefixed with DL (DL4330, DL4264, etc.)
Times shown in HHMM format (no colons), e.g. 1215 not 12:15
